text: I feel a quiet sense of curiosity as I transition from a stark, echoing hallway to a vibrant, stimulating exhibition space. The emptiness of the hall feels slightly disorienting, as if I am suspended between places, but stepping into the display of research and development, I am drawn into a conversation between technology and thought. I sense the potential for discovery, as if ideas are poised on the edge of revelation in this playful collision of color, text, and screens.
